description_long: This object resembles a stylized, reddish-brown crustacean with a segmented body and six elongated, jointed legs. The exoskeleton is smooth and glossy, with deep pinkish underparts visible in the body cavities and limb joints. The head features two slender, forward-pointing antennae and lacks prominent claws, giving it an ant-like appearance. The body is divided into three main segments, each with a pronounced, concave dorsal surface. The legs are thin and slightly curved, providing a delicate, spindly look. The overall form is organic and insectoid, with a hard, chitinous shell and a distinct separation between the head, thorax, and abdomen.
description: A reddish-brown, segmented crustacean with six jointed legs, pinkish underparts, and slender antennae. Its glossy exoskeleton and concave dorsal segments give it an ant-like, stylized appearance.
description_view_0: From this angle, the head, antennae, and front legs are most prominent, with the concave dorsal segments and pink underparts partially visible.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the elongated body, the arch of the legs, and the clear segmentation between the head, thorax, and abdomen.
description_view_2: The rear three-quarters view emphasizes the open, concave dorsal surfaces and the tapering abdomen, with all six legs visible.
description_view_3: From behind, the rounded abdomen and the symmetrical arrangement of the legs are most apparent, with the pink interior of the body segments clearly visible.
